name: getTestResultsByProjectAndAssigneeTest
description: 프로젝트별 담당자별 테스트 결과 리포트 API가 Json 스키마를 준수하는지 검증
descriptionHtml: 프로젝트별 담당자별 테스트 결과 리포트 API가 Json 스키마를 준수하는지 검증
statusMessage:
1 expectation failed.
Response body doesn't match expectation.
Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema.
error: object has missing required properties (["NOTRUN","SKIPPED"])
    level: "error"
    schema: {"loadingURI":"#","pointer":"/items"}
    instance: {"pointer":"/0"}
    domain: "validation"
    keyword: "required"
    required: ["BLOCKED","FAIL","NOTRUN","PASS","SKIPPED","assignee"]
    missing: ["NOTRUN","SKIPPED"]
error: object has missing required properties (["BLOCKED","NOTRUN","SKIPPED"])
    level: "error"
    schema: {"loadingURI":"#","pointer":"/items"}
    instance: {"pointer":"/1"}
    domain: "validation"
    keyword: "required"
    required: ["BLOCKED","FAIL","NOTRUN","PASS","SKIPPED","assignee"]
    missing: ["BLOCKED","NOTRUN","SKIPPED"]

  Actual: [{"PASS":8,"BLOCKED":1,"assignee":"com.testcase.testcasemanagement.model.User@3b095d0","FAIL":7},{"PASS":1,"assignee":"<not assigned>","FAIL":1}]
